question_html:
Make meaningful sentences with the following words:

Pinnacle, Mirage, Advent, Undermine, Dietary
solution_html:
Pinnacle: Winning the championship was the pinnacle of his career.

Mirage: In the desert, the travelers saw a mirage of water that wasn’t really there.

Advent: The advent of the internet has changed the way we communicate.

Undermine: Rumors can undermine a person’s reputation unfairly.

Dietary: Proper dietary habits are important for maintaining good health.

Marks Distribution:

(0.5×5)=2.5 marks for making meaningful and correct sentences with given words.

question_html:
Fill in the gaps with appropriate words:

The teacher demanded that every student (a) —— (submit) the assignment on time. Neither the monitor nor the class teachers (b) —— (notice) the error in the file. The monitor got his friend (c) —— (help) him rewrite it. If he (d) —— (follow) the format, he wouldn’t lose marks. It is high time he (e) —— (act) more responsibly.
solution_html:
(a) submit (b) noticed (c) to help (d) followed (e) acted

Marks Distribution:

(0.5×5)=2.5 marks for filling in the gaps with appropriate words

question_html: Write a paragraph on ‘The Challenges of Urbanization in Dhaka City’.
solution_html:
The Challenges of Urbanization in Dhaka City

Urbanization brings development and opportunities, but Dhaka City faces serious challenges due to its rapid growth. Overpopulation has led to severe traffic congestion, making daily commutes frustrating and time-consuming. The city struggles with inadequate infrastructure, such as insufficient roads, poor drainage systems, and unreliable public transportation. Rapid urban expansion has also caused environmental problems, including air and water pollution, threatening the health of residents. Moreover, slum areas continue to grow as many low-income families cannot afford proper housing. These challenges hamper Dhaka’s potential to develop smoothly and reduce the quality of life for its citizens. To manage urbanization effectively, Dhaka needs better planning, investment in infrastructure, and strict environmental regulations. Addressing these issues is essential for creating a sustainable and livable city in the future.

Marks Distribution:

0.5 mark for writing the title: ‘The Challenges of Urbanization in Dhaka City’.

01 mark for mentioning overpopulation and traffic congestion.

01 mark for discussing inadequate infrastructure and public transport problems.

01 mark for describing environmental pollution and health impacts.

01 mark for highlighting the growth of slums and housing issues.

0.5 mark for suggesting solutions like better planning and regulations.

[Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks have to be deducted from the deserved marks.

*0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]
